hvac / bms
HVAC / BMS / GMP Support 2026

Pharmaceutical HVAC & BMS Reliability Support

A professional case study on HVAC/BMS reliability support, AHU/VRF follow-up, vendor coordination, and practical engineering reporting in a pharmaceutical facility environment.

Azbil savic-net G5BMS/BASLG Multi V VRFAHUExcelVendor coordination

Technical scope

Supported HVAC/BMS follow-up through available BAS/BMS review, field coordination, vendor communication, issue documentation, and concise technical reporting.

Outcome / impact

Improved visibility of HVAC issue follow-up by organizing observations, action history, vendor input, and next steps into clearer engineering updates.

process system
Process / Thermal System 2025

Thermal Oil Heater & Energy System Engineering

Portfolio case study on process engineering support for thermal oil heating and related industrial energy system projects using calculation, drawing, documentation, and standards-based delivery.

Technical scope

Supported process engineering work scopes including calculation, drawing review, equipment documentation, and coordination across multiple project deliverables.

Outcome / impact

Helped maintain engineering delivery quality across multiple concurrent projects and contributed to more efficient documentation workflow.

instrument loop
Instrumentation / Control 2023-2024

HPAL Nickel Plant Instrumentation Maintenance

Portfolio case study on field instrumentation work in HPAL nickel processing plant, covering calibration, loop checking, troubleshooting, shutdown support, and reliability maintenance.

Pressure transmitterFlow transmitterLevel transmitterRTDThermocouplepH/ORP

Technical scope

Performed installation, calibration, loop checking, preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, troubleshooting, and shutdown support for instrumentation systems.

Outcome / impact

Supported plant reliability through disciplined field maintenance and safe instrumentation work practices.

Supported analysis, improvement tracking, automatic lighting implementation follow-up, utility evaluation, and reporting for energy-related initiatives.

Supported more structured energy improvement communication and practical facility efficiency initiatives.
